subject: Chemistry
solution:
Bond order of the covalent molecule, AX is given as 2.5, As AX  is a covalent diatomic molecule of second row elements of periodic table we can consider CO, NO  but bond order of CO having 14  electrons which is isoelectronic to nitrogen should be equal to 3 and NO  having 15 electrons will have a bond order of 2.5.

Molecular orbital configuration and bond order calculation of NO is

ABMO= antibonding molecular orbital

Bond order =Number of bonding electrons - number of anti bonding electrons.

Note: Total number of electrons equal to 13 will also have the 2.5 bond order. But in this case neutral diatomic molecule will not be possible

solution: Methane leads to both global warming & photochemical smog. Methane is generated in large amounts from paddy fields. <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><msub><mi>CO</mi><mn>2</mn></msub></math> can be absorbed by photosynthesis, or by formation of acid rain etc., while no such activities are there for methane. subject: Mathematics
solution:
Equation x3+ax2+bx+c=0 has roots α , β , γ. Therefore, 

α+β+γ=-a

αβ+βγ+γα=b

Since the given system of equations has non-trivial solutions,

we have 

αβγβγαγαβ=0

or α3+β3+γ3-3αβγ=0

or α+β+γ α2+β2+γ2-αβ-βγ-γα=0

or α+β+γ α+β+γ2-3αβ+βγ+γα=0

⇒  -aa2-3b=0

or a2/b=3

subject: Physics
solution:
Energy associated with each degree of freedom per molecule =12kBT.

Hence, the average value of energy along one degree of freedom for an ideal gas in thermal equilibrium at a temperature T =12kBT.
